candidates.why: A separate operating-level depreciation line exists, but it is generic and not labelled as COGS/cost of sales. Relative to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of revenues/COGS'), there is no clear evidence this row belongs specifically to COGS, so adding it to COGS would risk misclassification.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific D&A row appears in the operating section. The generic 'Depreciation' line should not be assigned to COGS absent clearer linkage.

candidates.why: The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Administrative Expenses', 'Administrative Expenses - other', and 'Personnel Expenses'. 'Depreciation' appears as a separate same-level operating line above the financial section, so it appears outside those selected XSGA component rows and should be added separately later.

variables.notes: Use the separate operating-level 'Depreciation' row for XSGA_DA because it appears distinct from the selected SG&A component rows and there is no more specific summary/component split to prefer.
